name: 120"x60" Tablecloth Navy Striped - Threshold™
description:
Dress your dining table in charm with this Navy Striped Tablecloth from Threshold™. Made from 100% cotton, this rectangular tablecloth offers protection against spills, stains, and scratches. Featuring a striped print in navy on a white background, this decorative tablecloth adds timeless charm to your space, while the machine-washable design makes cleanup a breeze.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
